3077580.name: Cyber Hearts Club
3077580.description:
Cyber Hearts Club takes place in the present day, in one single but crucial location: a house where you hide as the infamous criminal Larry. You’ve become so dangerous and notorious that the whole world wants you dead. Every attack, every group trying to break in, and every bullet is a new attempt to claim the enormous bounty on your head.

Larry shows no mercy – he is cold, calculating, and obsessed with survival, trusting no one. Your mission is to keep him alive for as long as possible, as the attacks grow more intense and the house turns into a true battleground under siege.
3077580.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
